page_title: E Neon Genesis Evangelion ~Memories of the Beginning~
text:
is a pachinko machine commemorating the 20 years of the partnership between EVANGELION and FIELDS. This machine focus on the story of Neon Genesis Evangelion, but for the first time, utilizes the Super Evangelion and Armaros from Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA.
